text: Two giraffe walk on the road near a tree at daybreak.
Bananas and lemons are placed in a glass bowl
Three parallel railroad tracks split into six separate tracks with a train on one of them.
a jet plane is parked out on a runway
A fire station with a truck in the bay with no one around.
A view of a bus traveling down the street, its got custom look to it.
A woman wearing a seat belt with her hair up in the air.
A bus is next to a building with large columns.
a four sided clock hanging in the air
A man fixing his tie in front of a mirror.
